name: Halloween Pumpkin Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Fresh ginger root, finely grated
1/4 cup Unsalted butter, cut into 12 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together salt and flour mixture in a food processor until combined.
2. Add butter and pulse until the dough resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Stir in egg until a dough forms.
4. Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Remove dough from refrigerator and unwrap it.
7. Flour your work surface and roll out dough into a 12-inch disk.
8. Fold dough in half, place it in a 9-inch pie pan, and unfold.
9. Press the dough firmly into the pan, trimming excess dough by about 1/2 inch at the edge.
10. Fold the dough under itself and flute the edges.
11. Fill the crust with pumpkin mixture:
- Whisk together eggs, yolks, sugar, salt, cinnamon, ginger (freshly grated), nutmeg, and half & half until smooth.
12. Pour filling into prepared pie crust and bake for about 1 hour at 350°F (175°C) on the lowest oven rack until set.
13. Allow the pie to cool on a rack before serving. If it needs to sit more than 2 hours before serving, loosely cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate.
Makes 8 servings.
